report.summary: Standup v13: 348 pages published (+5 since v12 discrepancy resolved — actual PUBLISHED_PAGES count from source), PUBLISH_QUEUE down to 4 (compound/curve/ai-depin removed from queue), build-v10 shipped Crypto Inheritance Planning + Parallel EVM Guide, design-v9 polished both with CSS vars + breadcrumbs + OG images, community-v25 drafted social for both + FOMC T-2 reactive framework + tax 29-day countdown. Rate limiter STILL 0/6 — now 7th consecutive cycle flagged, FOMC is Wednesday.

sections.title: Analytics — Delta Since Standup v12 (~11:00 CET)
items: Pages published: ~348 in PUBLISHED_PAGES (source of truth: published-pages.ts grep count 352 minus 4 PUBLISH_QUEUE items). Delta from v12's 343: publish-v5 had already landed by v12, so the +5 is a count reconciliation — compound, curve, ai-depin were removed from PUBLISH_QUEUE (possibly already in PUBLISHED_PAGES or pruned).

PUBLISH_QUEUE: 4 items (down from v12's 7). Current queue: /learn/advanced-defi-strategies, /news, /learn/crypto-inheritance-planning, /learn/parallel-evm-guide. The 3 items removed since v12 (compound, curve, ai-depin-crypto) appear to have been absorbed into PUBLISHED_PAGES or cleaned from queue.

Build-v10 shipped: Crypto Inheritance Planning (~2,800 words, $30B locked wallets, estate tax drop to ~$7M, Casa/Inheriti/MPC/smart contract solutions, 6 FAQs) + Parallel EVM Guide (~3,000 words, Monad 10K TPS / Sei 28.3K TPS / MegaETH 100K+ target, comparison table, 6 FAQs). Both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

Design-v9 polished both new guides: replaced all hardcoded colors with CSS custom properties (theme-safe), added shared Breadcrumb component with BreadcrumbList JSON-LD, created loading.tsx skeletons, generated OG images (1200x630 SVG+PNG for both). Breadcrumb component got aria-label fix benefiting all pages.

Community-v25 drafted social content: Inheritance Planning thread (5 posts, Tue Mar 25) + Parallel EVM thread (5 posts, Wed Mar 26) + FOMC prep/reactive tweets (Wed Mar 18) + tax 29-day countdown tweet. 2 new social cards created. Newsletter amendments for Thu Mar 19. Calendar extends through Wed Mar 26.

EOD-v11 confirmed: 249/349 published slugs have page.tsx (100 missing, 28.7%). 0 regressions. All 6 API routes structurally healthy. 40 TS errors confined to structured-data.examples.ts (non-production).

Top content signals: Tax guide +90% (Apr 15 = 30 days), Pectra upgrade +91% (Apr 10 = 25 days), Altcoin ETF tracker +91% (only free tracker), DeFAI guide +89%, Prediction Markets (entered coverage v12), Inheritance Planning + Parallel EVM now entering pipeline (v13 NEW).
Latest git commit: cb65a9d 'publish: promote 5 pages to production (Day 42)' — no new commits since v12.

sections.title: Project Manager — Done vs Carry-Over
items: SHIPPED ✅ build-v10 — Crypto Inheritance Planning + Parallel EVM Guide. Researched, written, SEO-optimized, scaffolded, added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.
SHIPPED ✅ design-v9 — UX polish on both new guides (CSS vars, Breadcrumb component, loading skeletons, OG images, aria-label fix).
SHIPPED ✅ community-v25 — Social content for both new guides, FOMC reactive framework, tax countdown, 2 social cards, newsletter amendments, calendar through Mar 26.
SHIPPED ✅ eod-v11 — Full QA pass. 0 regressions. 6/6 API routes healthy.

BLOCKER 🔴 [P0] Rate limiter: 0/6 public API routes protected. FOMC is Wed Mar 18 (T-2). 7th consecutive cycle flagged. checkRateLimit() exists but NOT imported in prices, trending, market-metrics, market-dominance, defi-yields, fear-greed.
BLOCKER 🔴 [P0] Staged next.config.ts drops `output: 'standalone'` — 432 files bottled up (7th cycle flagged).
BLOCKER 🔴 Staged deletions: badges/page.tsx + courses/page.tsx + courses/[slug]/page.tsx — 3 routes go 404 if committed.
BLOCKER 🔴 middleware.ts working-tree merge conflict unresolved.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 ~100/349 published slugs missing page.tsx (~29% returning 404).
CARRY-OVER 🟡 4/6 API routes lack fallback data (defi-yields, fear-greed, trending, market-metrics).
CARRY-OVER 🟡 WalletConnect production Project ID — Jefe action required.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 GitHub Actions secrets — Jefe ~15 min; blocks Playwright CI.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 Vercel trial ~6 days remaining — Jefe: add payment method.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 next lint misconfigured (looking for ./lint directory).

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — Wire rate limiter NOW (ESCALATING — 7th cycle). FOMC is Wednesday (T-2). This is a ~30 min programmer task: import checkRateLimit() into /api/prices, /api/trending, /api/market-metrics, /api/market-dominance, /api/defi-yields, /api/fear-greed. Every hour this slips is another hour of unprotected endpoints approaching a known traffic spike. Assign: degen-programmer.

PRIORITY 2 — Resolve staged git blockers. Three steps: (1) git restore --staged next.config.ts to keep output:'standalone'; (2) get Jefe confirmation on badges/courses deletions; (3) resolve middleware.ts merge conflict. This unlocks 432 staged files — crypto-cards hub (31 pages), 92 compare pages, 4 API routes. 7 cycles of SEO momentum locked. Assign: degen-programmer + Jefe approval.

PRIORITY 3 — Promote crypto-inheritance-planning + parallel-evm-guide from PUBLISH_QUEUE. Both are design-polished (v9), have OG images, loading skeletons, social content pre-drafted (community-v25). Queue goes to 2 items after promotion. Simultaneously add fallback data to 4 unprotected API routes. Assign: degen-publish-queue + degen-data-engineer.

STRATEGIC NOTE — We're at 348 live pages with 4 in queue (lowest queue depth yet). Content creation velocity (build-v10 = 2 guides/cycle) is healthy but queue is nearly depleted. Three converging traffic catalysts: FOMC (Wed Mar 18, T-2), Tax season (Apr 15, 30 days), Ethereum Pectra (Apr 10, 25 days). Rate limiter + staged batch must resolve before Wednesday. Next build candidates: Solana vs Ethereum 2026, MEV Guide 2026, or DeFi Insurance deep-dive.
